raw_consumer_statement:
I received a billing statement from Home Depot Consumer Credit Card services on or around XX/XX/year>. This billing statement indicated I made a purchase of {$1300.00} for a few items that I never heard of. I could not figure out what exactly was purchased because of the vague description on the statement. 

I then tried to log into my account, however I quickly realized that I never open a Home Depot account. I was able to log into my account by retrieving my username and changed the password. Online, I saw that this order was made at a Home Depot store in a city that I never have heard of in Michigan. ( Note : I tried to log into the account before writing this, but was not able to due to my SSN number not matching the name on the card? I can not remember the name of the city, but I looked it up at the time and I remember it being in the eastern part of Michigan. ) I called the credit card company, which appears to be in association with CitiBank, and explained everything. I was told this would be resolved. About XXXX weeks or so later, I received a letter saying that I was being held responsible for the charges. I called the company again, this time asking for information about the investigation. I wanted to know specifically how they came up with this decision to charge me, despite the fact that I did not make this purchase. I was told the investigation would be reopened, they asked me a couple of questions about the purchase, and then told me they would get back to me. 

I waiting another XXXX weeks or so and received an almost identical letter telling me the same thing : I am being held responsible for these charges. 

The bill is now {$1700.00} because of fees and interest. I have not made any payments. I feel like this company could have done way more to investigate. I did not make this purchase. I did not open the credit card. I have never heard of the city in which the Home Depot is located. The items purchased were never described to me. Nobody ever tried to find out if I had these items in hand. 

After a lot of searching, I came across this website that comes highly recommended. I am hoping this nightmare will end here. 

Thank you so much for your help.
